test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio (asyncio_mode=auto), conftest.py fixtures for mocking Vertex AI, MCP, Firestore
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest in backend/tests to verify existing + new tests pass. 2. Run pnpm build in frontend to confirm frontend is unaffected.
setup_instructions: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && cd frontend && pnpm install
contribution_requirements: No specific CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns.
key_patterns: Agents inherit from AgentBase. OrchestratorAgent.execute() and execute_streaming() both have sequential for-loops dispatching to multiple agents. Tests mock agents via AgentRegistry._agents and use AsyncMock. Status callbacks are sent before each agent dispatch. _consolidate_responses handles multi-agent result merging. Single-agent paths are separate and should not be changed.
directory_structure: backend/app/agents/ - all agent implementations; backend/tests/ - all test files; frontend/ - Next.js app
